description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a polymer frame and a matte-finished metal slide, reminiscent of modern service pistols such as the Glock series. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a series of horizontal grooves for enhanced handling and control, and the trigger guard is robust and squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The slide features subtle serrations at the rear for improved racking, and faint markings are visible along its length, suggesting manufacturer or model information. The barrel is short and flush with the slide, with a visible muzzle opening and no external threading or compensator. The magazine base is flat and integrated seamlessly with the grip, lacking any pronounced extension or finger rest. The overall color scheme is a combination of dark gray and black, with a utilitarian, tactical appearance suitable for urban law enforcement or civilian self-defense contexts.
description: A modern, semi-automatic handgun with a matte metal slide, contoured grooved grip, and flat magazine base, finished in dark gray and black tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the slide, grip grooves, and trigger guard details.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the narrow profile of the slide and grip, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide, grip, and trigger guard from the other side, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel opening, front sight, and the squared-off trigger guard.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically shaped with a pronounced palm swell and a series of deep, horizontal grooves running along its length, providing a secure, non-slip surface. The material appears to be matte black polymer, offering both durability and a slightly textured feel. There are no visible logos or finger grooves, and the grip's contour is smooth and gently curved to fit the hand comfortably. The base of the grip is flat, seamlessly integrating with the magazine base. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and control over decorative embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and squared-off, with a thick profile and ample internal space, likely to accommodate gloved fingers. Its lower edge is straight and unadorned, lacking any undercuts or accessory rails. The surface is smooth, matching the matte finish of the grip, and there are no visible reinforcements or texturing. The squared design gives it a modern, tactical appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the front of the slide, with a standard round profile and no external threading, porting, or compensator features. The muzzle opening is clearly visible, and the exterior finish matches the matte, slightly worn look of the slide. There are no visible markings or embellishments on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features faint, linear markings along its length, with some subtle text or numbering near the rear, possibly indicating a model or serial number. These markings are not highly prominent and blend into the matte, slightly weathered finish of the slide. No large manufacturer logos or decorative engravings are visible.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extension, bevel, or finger rest. Its design is minimalistic, with no visible logos, texturing, or embellishments, maintaining a seamless transition from the grip to the magazine base.
